liquidityNotes: Official Ondo docs confirm OUSG can be redeemed to USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD, or USD bank wire, but this repair pass did not verify T+1 timing or a current minimum redemption amount. Issuer redemption should not be conflated with DEX or secondary-market liquidity.

_meta.notes: Unsupported T+1 timing and minimum redemption amount were removed pending official verification; dexPairs remains empty because issuer redemption is not DEX or secondary-market liquidity.
